pages.text: $(italic)Novus's$() companion to $(italic)Biomancy$() — the flesh-and-bile arts, the Primordial Cradle and its tributes, the living machines that grow from them. Biomancy's own guide (the unfinished $(italic)Primordial Index$()) was never completed, so this was written in its place.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + any $(italic)raw meat$(), shapeless.
pages.title: Wetware Appendix
